title: Trilegal advises Bluspring Enterprises on acquisition of Steag Energy Services
description: Bluspring Enterprises Limited has acquired the India business of German energy company STEAG Power GmbH, Steag Energy Services (India) Private Limited, through its wholly-owned subsidiary, Bluspring New Horizon One Private Limited.Steag Energy Services (India) currently has two subsidiaries: STEAG Energy Services (Botswana) (Pty) Ltd., a wholly-owned subsidiary based in Botswana, and STEAG O&M Company Private Limited, a joint venture with Hinduja Energy (India) Limited.
